verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Lau kei in la lungkia kei in. Galkap khempeuh nang kiangah la in la, kithawi-in Ai-ah paito in. Nangma khutsungah Ai kumpipa leh a mite, a khuapi, leh a leitang kong piak khitna thei in

Jerikho leh a kumpipa tungah na bawl bangin Ai leh a kumpipa tungah na bawl ding a, a van kinusiate leh a ganhingte bek note-a' dingin na la ding uh hi. A khuapi nungah a khuapi a sim dingin na buksim ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua leh galkap khempeuh Ai-ah a paito dingin kipan uh hi. Joshua in a tha kicing mi thahat tul sawmthum teel a, zanin tua mite a sawlkhia hi
Amah in amaute thu pia a, “En un, tua khuapi a sim dingin a nungah na buksim ding uh a, khuapi panin gamlapi-ah na pai kei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a kigingsa-in na om ding uh a
tua ciangin keimah leh kei tawh a om mite khempeuh in khuapi kong naih ding uh hi. A masa bangin kote a do dingin hong kuankhiat uh ciangin amaute' mai-ah kote ka na tai khem ding uh hi

Khuapi panin amaute hong paikhiat khit uh matengin kote hong delh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ‘A masa-a bangin eite' mai-ah amaute tai uh hi,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute kiang panin ko ka tai ding uh hi
Tua ciangin na buksimna panun note na kipan ding uh a, khuapi na la ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un note' khutsungah hong pia ding hi
Khuapi na lak khit uh ciangin Topa' hong sawlna bangin hihin, mei tawh khuapi na hal ding uh hi. Note thu kong piak khitna thei un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in amaute a sawlkhia hi. A buksimna ding uh munah amaute pai-in, Ai nitumna lam, Bethel leh Ai kikalah pang uh a, ahih hangin tua zanin giahphuala mite lakah Joshua omlai hi
Zingsangin Joshua tho baihin mite sam a, mite' mai-ah Israel upate tawh Ai-ah a paito uh hi
Amah tawh a om galkap khempeuh paito uh a, khuapi mai naihin Ai leilu lampangah phual sat uh a, Ai leh amaute' kikalah luihawm khat om hi
Tua ciangin amah in mi tul nga bang paipihin, khuapi nitumna lam Bethel leh Ai kikalah a buksim dingin a koih hi
Tua ahih ciangin galkapte, khuapi leilu lamah a phualpi leh khuapi nitumna lamah a nungdalte a koih uh hi. Ahih hangin tua zanin Joshua kuam sungah a om hi

Ai kumpipa in hih thu a theih ciangin amah leh tua khuapi mi khempeuh, Israel-te a do dingin manlangin kithawi-in Arabah lam paisukna-ah zingtungin a kuankhia uh hi. Ahih hangin khuapi nungah amah a buksim a omlam theilo hi
Tua ciangin amau' mai-ah Joshua leh Israel-te khempeuh kilelsak khem uh a, gamlak lamah a tai uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin khuapi sunga om mi khempeuhte amau a delh dingin kikaikhawm uh a, Joshua a delh uh ciangin amaute khuapi panin a kihemkhia ahi hi
Ai khuasung pan Israel-te a delhlo pasal khat beek omlo uh a, khuapi kong hon'sa-in nusia-in Israel-te a delh uh hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Na khutsunga om teipi Ai lamah zan in. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khutsungah tua khua kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in a khutsunga om teipi khuapi lamah a zan hi
Tua ciangin a buksimte diangkhia pah uh a, amah in a khut a zan khit phetin amaute tai-in khuapi sungah lut uh a, a khuapi la-in manlangin a hal uh hi

Ai mite in a nung et kik uh ciangin, khuapi meikhu vanah a kahto a mu uh hi. A nung a mai koimahah tai theilo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlak lamah tai-in a kilelsak khemte in amau a delhte' lamah hong kihei-in lehdelh kik uh hi
A buksimte in khuapi a lak khitna leh khuapi meikhu a kahtohna Joshua leh Israel khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin amaute kihei kikin Ai mite vatgawp uh hi

Tua ciangin Ai khua mite a do dingin khuapi panin Israel dangte hong kuankhia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te' kikalah amaute om uh a, pawlkhat hih lamah pawlkhat hua lamah om uh ahih manin a suakta khat zong a omlo dongin Israel-te in amaute a vatmai uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute in Ai kumpipa hingmatin Joshua kiangah a paipih uh hi

Amaute in a delhna gamlakah Ai khuami khempeuh thatin, amaute khempeuh a bei dongin namsau tawh a thah uh a man khit uh ciangin, Israel-te khempeuh Ai-ah paikikin Ai khuami a omlaite namsau tawh a vatgawp uh hi
Tua ni-in a si, Ai mi khempeuh numei leh pasal a vekpi-in tul sawm leh tul nih ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Ai khuami khempeuh a suksiatmang khit matengin amah in a teipi a zanna a khut dokkiklo hi
Amah in Joshua a thupiak, Topa' thugenna bangin Israel-te in ganhing leh khuapi sunga van kinusiate bek a la uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in Ai hal a, tuni donga a om mah bangin nin kholnapi khatin piangsak den hi

Tua ciangin amah in nitak mateng sing khat tungah Ai kumpipa a khai hi. Ni a tum ciangin Joshua in thu pia a, amaute in sing tung panin a luang la sukin, khuapi kulhkongpi lutna-ah paai uh a, a tungah suangtum lompi ciang uh a, tuni dongin tua suangcian omlai hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Ebal Mual tungah a Kigelh Thukham

verses.text: Tua ciangin Joshua in, Moses Thukham Laibu sungah, “A kiseeklo suangte tawh a kibawl biakna tau, kuamah in a tungah siknazat a likloh,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin, Topa' nasem Moses in Israel mite a thupiakna bangin, Topa, Israel mite' Pasian-a' dingin Ebal Mual tungah biakna tau khat a bawl hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tua tungah Topa-a' dingin meihal biaknate pia-in, thunuama biaknate a go uh hi
Tua lai mun, Israel mite' omna-ah, Moses in a gelhsa a thukhamte tua suangte tungah a gelh hi

Tua ciangin Israel mite in thupha a ngah theihna dingun Topa' nasem Moses in a thupiaksa bangin Israel mite khempeuh peemta hita leh tualsuak hita leh, a upate leh a uliante leh a thukhente uh tawh, Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi siampite' mai, Thuciamna Singkuang langkhat, Gerizim Mual mailamah mi alang, Ebal Mual mailamah mi alang a ding uh hi
Tua khit ciangin amah in thukham laibu sunga a kigelh bangbangin thukham kammal khempeuh, thupha leh samsiatnate a sim hi
Moses in a thupiak kammalte khempeuh Israel mihonpite, numeite, leh amaute lakah a teng peemtate mai-ah Joshua in a simloh khatzong omlo hi.
